text:
Afther updating all sources, I've complied (buildworld, buildkernel)
Installed new kernel but no luck. The skinned kernel, nor the GENERIC
one can attach the disk to the ata controller.

Fix: not known (roll back to older kernel version (6.2)

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Test on any Geode based unit
